perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white lace shawl stands in a Costco supermarket holding a pre-packaged food container, pointing and smiling at the camera. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor dining setting where the same woman and another woman in a blue beret are seated behind a table, holding up various plastic-wrapped ingredients (soup, meat, vegetables) from the kit. (3) Close-up shots of the individual ingredients being arranged in a large blue pot. (4) The blue pot is shown on a stovetop with the soup base bubbling and simmering, revealing tripe, mushrooms, and rice cakes. (5) The two women are seen eating from the pot with spoons, nodding and giving thumbs-up gestures with expressions of satisfaction.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music plays throughout. A female voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin, describing her shopping find. (2) Ambient supermarket background noise is present but faint. (3) The audio shifts to a home environment with two female voices engaging in a conversational review; the primary speaker's tone is friendly and expressive. (4) Playful cartoonish sound effects (pings and pops) are heard periodically as text graphics appear on screen. (5) The sound of soup bubbling is briefly audible during the cooking shots. (6) The video ends with both women speaking in a cheerful, recommending tone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. (2) Decorative Text: '聽說這個很厲害' (Hear this is very powerful) - intrigued tone. (3) Functional Text: '胡椒豬肚雞肉鍋' (Pepper Pork Tripe Chicken Pot) - product title. (4) Functional Text: '511元' - price information. (5) Decorative Text: '超級好吃' (Super delicious) - high emphasis tone. (6) Decorative Text: '完美搭配' (Perfect match) - celebratory tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro in supermarket -> Unboxing ingredients at home -> Cooking demonstration -> Tasting and review

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, approximately 3 background shoppers in the supermarket scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wearing a black and white bucket hat and a white lace shawl; another woman wearing a blue beret and a light grey sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse aisle with refrigerated food cases; a domestic kitchen/dining area with a white marble-patterned table and a sofa in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a detailed consumer review of the 'Pork Tripe and Chicken Pepper Pot' from Costco, evaluating its value for money, ingredient quality, and taste profile to help viewers decide if it is worth purchasing.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcase of product packaging, price analysis, and positive taste review focused on a specific retailer's product.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show style text overlays and expressive facial reactions common in Taiwanese food vlogs.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses fast-paced editing and beat-synced text to maintain high engagement throughout the product review.
